verses.1: Tabaraka allathee biyadihi almulku wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
verses.2: Allathee khalaqa almawta waalhayata liyabluwakum ayyukum ahsanu AAamalan wahuwa alAAazeezu alghafooru
verses.3: Allathee khalaqa sabAAa samawatin tibaqan ma tara fee khalqi alrrahmani min tafawutin fairjiAAi albasara hal tara min futoorin
verses.4: Thumma irjiAAi albasara karratayni yanqalib ilayka albasaru khasian wahuwa haseerun
verses.5: Walaqad zayyanna alssamaa alddunya bimasabeeha wajaAAalnaha rujooman lilshshayateeni waaAAtadna lahum AAathaba alssaAAeeri
verses.6: Walillatheena kafaroo birabbihim AAathabu jahannama wabisa almaseeru
verses.7: Itha olqoo feeha samiAAoo laha shaheeqan wahiya tafooru
verses.8: Takadu tamayyazu mina alghaythi kullama olqiya feeha fawjun saalahum khazanatuha alam yatikum natheerun
verses.9: Qaloo bala qad jaana natheerun fakaththabna waqulna ma nazzala Allahu min shayin in antum illa fee dalalin kabeerin
verses.10: Waqaloo law kunna nasmaAAu aw naAAqilu ma kunna fee ashabi alssaAAeeri
verses.12: Inna allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi lahum maghfiratun waajrun kabeerun
verses.13: Waasirroo qawlakum awi ijharoo bihi innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
verses.14: Ala yaAAlamu man khalaqa wahuwa allateefu alkhabeeru
verses.15: Huwa allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda thaloolan faimshoo fee manakibiha wakuloo min rizqihi wailayhi alnnushooru
verses.16: Aamintum man fee alssamai an yakhsifa bikumu alarda faitha hiya tamooru
verses.17: Am amintum man fee alssamai an yursila AAalaykum hasiban fasataAAlamoona kayfa natheeri
verses.18: Walaqad kaththaba allatheena min qablihim fakayfa kana nakeeri
verses.19: Awalam yaraw ila alttayri fawqahum saffatin wayaqbidna ma yumsikuhunna illa alrrahmanu innahu bikulli shayin baseerun
verses.20: Amman hatha allathee huwa jundun lakum yansurukum min dooni alrrahmani ini alkafiroona illa fee ghuroorin
verses.21: Amman hatha allathee yarzuqukum in amsaka rizqahu bal lajjoo fee AAutuwwin wanufoorin
verses.22: Afaman yamshee mukibban AAala wajhihi ahda amman yamshee sawiyyan AAala siratin mustaqeemin
verses.23: Qul huwa allathee anshaakum wajaAAala lakumu alssamAAa waalabsara waalafidata qaleelan ma tashkuroona
verses.24: Qul huwa allathee tharaakum fee alardi wailayhi tuhsharoona
verses.25: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
verses.26: Qul innama alAAilmu AAinda Allahi wainnama ana natheerun mubeenun
verses.27: Falamma raawhu zulfatan seeat wujoohu allatheena kafaroo waqeela hatha allathee kuntum bihi taddaAAoona
verses.28: Qul araaytum in ahlakaniya Allahu waman maAAiya aw rahimana faman yujeeru alkafireena min AAathabin aleemin
verses.29: Qul huwa alrrahmanu amanna bihi waAAalayhi tawakkalna fasataAAlamoona man huwa fee dalalin mubeenin
verses.30: Qul araaytum in asbaha maokum ghawran faman yateekum bimain maAAeenin
